# displaysPostProcessApplicationControl

**Instance Property**

Displays whether the post process application control should be displayed.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor var displaysPostProcessApplicationControl: Bool { get set }
```

## Discussion

The post process application is only relevant when the [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/IKCameraDeviceView/transferMode] is set to [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/IKCameraDeviceViewTransferMode/fileBased].

## Getting and Setting the Post Processing Application

- **postProcessApplication**: The URL of the application used to post process the image.
